integration_targets: Core banking system (transaction feed), payment processor (authorization API), risk management platform
portfolio_fit_notes: Deep systems engineering + ML: demonstrates streaming architectures, sub-100ms latency optimization, model explainability (SHAP), and compliance/audit trails. Strong fit for fintech and high-stakes FDE roles.
